{{Expand}}

{{Infobox icon
| name = Emperor's face
| introduced = ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea
}}

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The [[Emperor's face]] is printed on one side of gray bills used as currency.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c3">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 3</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Icons]]
[[Category:Of Shadow and Sea]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
